subject: Season's greetings! Festive picks from F1000
body:
To ensure you receive emails from Faculty of 1000, add info@updates.f1000.com to your safelist.

-----------------------------------------------------

Faculty of 1000 |  http://f1000.com                
Monthly Update  |  December 2013         

-----------------------------------------------------
 
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ 
  Season's greetings and best wishes        
  for the New Year from everybody at Faculty of 1000!    
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~  

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ 
 Highly influential scientists amongst F1000 Faculty    
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ 
Using citation data collected from 1996-2011, authors writing in the European Journal of Investigation last month published a list of 539 influential biomedical researchers, of which 59 are F1000Prime Faculty Members [ http://blog.f1000.com/2013/11/11/f1000prime-faculty-members-among-highly-influential-biomedical-researchers/ ]. 

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ 
 F1000Prime partnership in bioinformatics     
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ 
Members of the International Society for Computational Biology can now receive full access to F1000Prime until 30 April 2014 [ http://f1000.com/prime/iscb ] as part of their society membership. And -- a list of the latest recommended articles in F1000Prime's Bioinformatics and Computational Biology Faculty is freely available in Mendeley [ http://blog.f1000.com/2013/10/30/mendeley-and-a-microcosmic-narrative/ ]. 


   F1000Prime                             
==================

1,328 recommendations [ http://f1000.com/prime/search/evaluations ] added in the past month. Below is a selection:   

Back to full potential    
[ http://f1000.com/prime/718113987?key=QnjYjslm4YKoNMr ]   
This paper provides a loophole to the stochastic nature of reprogramming, allowing somatic cells to be reverted back into pluripotent stem cells.   
Rais Y, Zviran A, Geula S et al.    
Nature. 2013 Oct 3; 502:65-70

Decoding asthma    
[ http://f1000.com/prime/718097799?key=KwY5rzjd4DU1mFq ]   
This study on asthma polymorphisms demonstrates a broad approach with which to bridge the gap between genetic association at the population level and molecular cell mechanisms.
Ho JE, Chen WY, Chen MH et al.   
J Clin Invest. 2013 Oct 1; 123:4208-18

Significant stats    
[ http://f1000.com/prime/718170771?key=GqPGUd2xQAJqOLD ]   
Too often scientists try to find a statistical significance test "validating" their hypothesis after the experiment, which may be a reason why so many studies are irreproducible.   
Johnson VE. Proc Natl Acad Sci U S A. 2013; 110:19313-7   

* F1000Prime Reports *

Open-access review journal [ http://f1000.com/prime/reports/ ], reporting on the hottest topics.

New and alternative approaches to tackling antibiotic resistance    
[ http://f1000.com/prime/reports/b/5/51/ ]   
Multi-drug-resistant bacteria are fast overcoming our current arsenal of antibiotics, thanks to our complacency, but recent advances in thwarting their resistance mechanisms give us cause for hope.
F1000Prime Report by Theriault N and Tillotson GS [ http://f1000.com/prime/thefaculty/member/6565473182507832 ].
F1000Prime Rep 2013, 5:51

 ---------------
 See all recent F1000Prime Reports          
 >> http://f1000.com/prime/reports/                 
 ---------------   
    
  
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
 F1000Prime: Live online demo 
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
 
Get the most out of F1000Prime - attend a live online demonstration.

Please choose one of the following time zones:

 ---------------------------
 > > The Americas: http://f1000-demo-americas.eventbrite.co.uk/    
 > > Europe & Asia: http://f1000-demo-eu-asia.eventbrite.co.uk/   
 ---------------------------



   F1000Research                      
======================

Our innovative open access journal [ http://f1000research.com/ ] offering rapid publication, open peer review and open data.

Below is a selection of our latest peer reviewed articles:  

RESEARCH ARTICLE
Homologous electron transport components fail to increase fatty acid hydroxylation in transgenic Arabidopsis thaliana [ http://f1000research.com/articles/2-203/v2 ] [v2; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/2a3 ]
Latest Published: 13 Nov 2013   
Wayne LL, Browse J.   
F1000Research 2:203   

CORRESPONDENCE
Issues with data transformation in genome-wide association studies for phenotypic variability [ http://f1000research.com/articles/2-200/v1 ] [v1; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/1xl ]   
Published: 02 Oct 2013   
Shen X, Rönnegård L.   
F1000Research 2:200     

RESEARCH ARTICLE
Isoform-specific anti-MeCP2 antibodies confirm that expression of the e1 isoform strongly predominates in the brain [ http://f1000research.com/articles/2-204/v1 ] [v1; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/1mg ]    
Published: 04 Oct 2013    
Kaddoum L, Panayotis N, Mazarguil H et al.     
F1000Research 2:204   


~~~~~~~~~~
 APC Waiver until December 31st
~~~~~~~~~~

Until December 31st, we're waiving the article processing charge on your first ecology paper [ http://f1000research.com/ecology2013?code=ECOL20  ], software paper [ http://f1000research.com/software2013?code=SOFT13PM ], or medical case report [ http://f1000research.com/case-reports2013?code=CASE19 ]. Click the relevant link to retrieve your waiver code.

---------------------------------------------
 Submit now to F1000Research          
 >> http://f1000research.com/author/submit        
----------------------------------------------

    
   F1000Trials                     
==================

A comprehensive listing [ http://f1000.com/trials ] of clinical trial articles reviewed by the F1000 Faculty, with the most important tagged as recommended.

Below is a taster of F1000Trials content. To read, please sign-in [ http://f1000.com/trials/signin ] or register for free [ http://f1000.com/trials/register ]:  

Knife vs. Kegels    
[ http://f1000.com/trials/718114072?key=M2a2G68jjsMFWXY ]   
An RCT suggests that surgery should be offered over physiotherapy (pelvic floor exercises) as first-line treatment for stress urinary incontinence.   
Labrie J, Berghmans BLCM, Fischer K et al.    
N Engl J Med. 2013 Sep 19; 369:1124-33

A weighty issue      
[ http://f1000.com/trials/718118375?key=1Qmb7chqnpQMPKP ]   
It might seem obvious, but an RCT confirms that exercise and diet plans help those with knee osteoarthritis lose weight and hence lighten the load on the joints.  
Messier SP, Mihalko SL, Legault C et al.     
JAMA. 2013 Sep 25; 310:1263-73

A topical subject for keratitis    
[ http://f1000.com/trials/13357382?key=gtSMlyDfzD35Xve ]   
Is there clinical benefit in using topical corticosteroids as adjunctive therapy in the treatment of bacterial keratitis?
Srinivasan M, Mascarenhas J, Rajaraman R et al.    
Arch Ophthalmol. 2012 Feb; 130(2):143-50   

    
    
    F1000Posters                 
======================
 
Open Repository [ http://f1000.com/posters ] for posters and slide presentations; completely free to view and submit. Below are a few selections:

* NEUROSCIENCE *    
 
Shifts of attention in video game players and non-players    
[ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1094619 ]   
Mack D, Wiesmann H, Ilg U.   
F1000Posters 2013, 4:1330   

* SCIENCE COMMUNICATION *   

The academic impact of research: current and the future citation trends in developing countries    
[ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1094613 ]   
Ebrahim NA.   
F1000Posters 2013, 4:1322  

* ANESTHESIOLOGY & PAIN MANAGEMENT *

An exploration of religious faith and the management of pain among older people   
[ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1094646 ]    
Edwards J, Briggs M, Atkin K et al.    
F1000Posters 2013, 4:1357   

----------------------------------------------
 Deposit now        
 >> http://f1000.com/posters/fordepositors      
---------------------------------------------- 
 
  
----------------------

 * F1000Tips *

Follow @F1000Tips on Twitter [ http://twitter.com/f1000tips ] for tips, tricks, and customer support for all Faculty of 1000 service:

@F1000 | https://twitter.com/f1000   
@F1000Trials | http://twitter.com/f1000trials  
@F1000Research | http://twitter.com/f1000research   
@F1000Posters | http://twitter.com/f1000posters 
  
---------------------- 
 
-----------------------------------------------------   

In addition to this Monthly Update, we also send out emails featuring deals and discounts for registered users. To sign up, registered users should visit MyF1000 via any F1000 product and opt-in to receive "Information from F1000 about special offers" (under Email Alerts).

You have received this message because you asked to receive the F1000 Monthly Update to your registered email address from Faculty of 1000. If you do not wish to receive any further such messages, you may unsubscribe [ http://www.f1000.com/unsubscribe/email?email=jeeproject@yahoo.com&emailAlertType=MONTHLY_UPDATES ] at any time. For further information or enquiries please contact Customer Services at info@f1000.com [ mailto:info@f1000.com ].

Faculty of 1000 Ltd | Science Navigation Group
Registered in England and Wales with Company Number 3739756
Middlesex House, 34-42 Cleveland Street | London, W1T 4LB | United Kingdom
